# Shylock

> AI-powered debt collections platform for banks, fintechs, and microfinance institutions in Africa.

Shylock automates loan recovery using voice AI agents that call borrowers in their language — Pidgin, Swahili, Yoruba, French, English, and Zulu — negotiate payment plans, and report results in real time. Every call is recorded, transcribed, and fully auditable.

## Product

- Upload a CSV of borrowers. Calls begin in 60 seconds.
- AI agents call borrowers via voice, SMS, and email.
- Agents negotiate repayment plans and capture promises to pay.
- Real-time dashboard with transcripts, payment tracking, and audit trail.
- 8 languages supported. 17 voice presets.
- Contingency pricing: no recovery, no fee.

## Use Cases

### Fintech Collections
Digital lenders use Shylock to recover overdue loans at scale. Upload your delinquent book and AI agents call every borrower — no headcount, no call centre.

### Microfinance Collections
MFIs use Shylock to scale collections without scaling cost. AI handles thousands of calls per day in the borrower's language while field agents focus on relationships.

### Banking NPL Management
Banks use Shylock to manage non-performing loans compliantly. Every call is recorded, transcribed, and logged with a full audit trail for regulators.

## How It Works

1. Upload your portfolio — names, phone numbers, amounts. Any size. Takes 60 seconds.
2. AI agents call borrowers in their language. They negotiate payment plans, handle objections, and capture commitments.
3. Track promises to pay, completed payments, and full transcripts. Real-time dashboard. Full audit trail.
